title: Puff Radio
description: A Resource pack that changes the minecraft sounds to Pokemon in-game music from various Pokemon Games!
body:
Official Sound pack for all modpacks who like Pokemon Music!

This resourcepack was created to replace MUSIC only on minecraft, for a better playing experience. Lets face it minecraft music can get boring and some music can be annoying.

Developed by Swordsman69x!

We our partnered with [BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/stargate)!

BisectHosting offers quick, simple, and high-quality server hosting with over a dozen locations available across the world, ensuring low latency. After your purchase, the server is already configured and ready to use. Use the code "stargate" to get 25% off your first month as a new client for any of their gaming servers.
![Partner Promo Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2576086a086f681bfa6f88c5e6a09a775d166f9.jpeg)

Sounds and music from:
https://downloads.khinsider.com/?u=2856400
